data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pausing a subscription while keeping the slot reserved. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the ability to pause a subscription, but without concrete evidence of how this is implemented or validated, it indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or state checks confirming the ability to pause a subscription while keeping the slot reserved.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to pause a subscription.
